message:
test(replay): add replay capture integration test and proptest regression seeds

New integration test (replay_capture_integration.rs):
- 271-line test module exercising the full replay capture pipeline
  end-to-end: capture event ingestion, segment extraction, artifact
  write/read round-trip, and decision metadata fidelity

Proptest regressions (proptest_replay_shadow_rollout.proptest-regressions):
- Seed file for proptest regression testing of the replay shadow
  rollout property tests — ensures previously-found edge cases are
  always re-tested on future runs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc a70d67c2319ad1d5228a0c6682189127d5886287333334389662b9aefd25d505 # shrinks to total = 226, flaky = 27
